title: Closures, Lexical State, Currying, and Factories · Evaluation Trace: Function Factory Tests
summary: Create configurable validators without mutable module globals or late-binding bugs. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp function factory tests increment in a closure-based validator factory with capture tests. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Test factory isolation, captured configuration, invalid inputs, and repeated invocation.
Distinguish currying from partial application and choose only when APIs become clearer.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
